title: Fuzz targets created: signature_parser, sanitize, image_sniff
description: Three fuzz targets created under fuzz/fuzz_targets/. Run with cargo +nightly fuzz run <target>. All three pass initial runs (7.7M, 73K, 1.35M iterations respectively). The sanitize fuzzer found a real P0 panic in ammonia (rel attribute assertion) which is now fixed.
close_reason: Cargo audit: rsa/instant accepted as known risk. Fuzz: ammonia panic fixed, 3 fuzz targets created. Ops: file permission warning at startup, quality gates in CLAUDE.md, signing error sanitized in last_error.
